security_gap.gap_description: An attacker can spam the boost validator functionality, causing a denial of service.

actor_risk.description: Any user that boosts a validator with $BGT

behavioral_risk.rationale: Spamming the boost functionality can disrupt the normal operation of the validator boost system.

assumptions: There are no rate limits on the number of boost transactions a user can send.
The BeraHub component does not have rate limiting for the boost validator functionality.

mitigation.strategy: Implement rate limiting on the BeraHub component to prevent users from spamming the boost validator functionality.

description: An attacker can spam the boost validator functionality, causing a denial of service and disrupting the normal operation of the validator boost system.
